document_identity.franchisor_address: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

brand_description.description: LXR Hotels & Resorts is a collection of award-winning luxury hotel properties. Strategically positioned in some of the world's marquee destinations, each property has its own distinct history infused with its distinctive locale, providing a luxurious getaway for its guests.

initial_franchise_fee.refund_policy: Refundable less $7,500 processing fee if withdrawn before approval or denied. Non-refundable once approved.

program_fee.covers: Reservation systems, advertising, marketing, quality assurance, technology, administrative overhead

hilton_honors.waiver: Waived for stays where guest enrolled on-property

investment.excludes: Real property, market studies, insurance, interest
investment.note: Because it is a new brand, we do not yet have actual initial investment information for an LXR hotel

territory.restricted_area_note: May negotiate for new dev/conversion. Not typically for CoO or re-licensing. Historically extended to full term, but 'we do not intend to do so in the future.'

termination.by_franchisee: Not authorized. Unilateral termination is material breach.
termination.termination_fee_post_opening_before_2yr: Greater of (avg monthly royalty x 60) or ($25,000 x rooms)
termination.termination_fee_last_60_months: Avg monthly royalty x remaining months

transfer.death_disability: Transfer to immediate family within 1 year, must meet then-current requirements

noncompete.during_term: Cannot be competitor brand owner/licensor. May be franchisee of competitor, manage competitor property, or hold minority interest.
noncompete.management_company_restriction: Cannot be exclusive manager for a Competitor

dispute_resolution.forum: US District Court for Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria), or Fairfax County VA state court, or New York NY. Franchisor may sue where hotel is located.

item19.no_fpr_statement: We do not make any representations about a franchisee's future financial performance or the past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets.

item20_outlet_data.gag_clause_text: During the last 3 fiscal years, some current and former franchisees have signed provisions restricting their ability to speak about their experience with us.

item21_financial_health.entity_note: Financial statements cover ALL Hilton brands franchised in the US, not just LXR

notable_pending: Multiple antitrust class actions re hotel pricing algorithms (IDeaS, SAS, Amadeus, CoStar)
notable_concluded: Texas AG settlement ($2.1M) - mandatory guest fee disclosure
Nebraska AG settlement ($300K) - mandatory guest fee disclosure

special_risks.description: Franchise Agreement requires disputes be resolved in Virginia (or New York backup). May cost more to litigate out of state.

California.override: May be unenforceable under CA CC §1671
NY governing law may be unenforceable

Hawaii.override: Does not relieve liability under HI franchise law

Illinois.override: IL Act governs for IL licensees
Waiver of IL Act rights is void

Maryland.override: MD law may supersede FA on termination/renewal
May sue in MD for MD law claims (3-yr SOL)
Does not relieve MD law liability; no questionnaire waiver

Michigan.override: FMV compensation if term <5yr and restricted from continuing
Pre-contract releases depriving MI Act rights are void

Minnesota.override: 90 days notice (60 to cure); 180 days non-renewal notice
Out-of-state litigation and jury waiver prohibited
Does not relieve MN law liability

New_York.override: Franchisee may terminate on grounds available by law
May not be enforceable under NY law

North_Dakota.override: Does not relieve ND law liability

Rhode_Island.override: Does not apply to RI Act claims
Out-of-state venue and non-RI law void for RI Act claims

Virginia.override: Unlawful to cancel without reasonable cause under VA Act

Washington.override: WA law may supersede FA on termination/renewal
Excludes WA Act claims (except negotiated settlement with counsel)
Void if employee <$100K or IC <$250K; no-poach void
Arbitration/mediation in WA or mutually agreed

unresolveds.description: Investment range ($5.4M-$845.8M) lacks practical utility; no actual LXR investment data
HPMS migration timeline and cost unknown; anticipated but not required
All franchisor assets pledged for Hilton parent debt (2025-2033)
Ultra-small system (4 hotels) with zero projected growth
Forbes Travel Guide mandatory cost ($22,400/yr) with no performance benchmarks
Spa ongoing management fees not specified
Mandatory Guest Fee amounts not disclosed; included in GRR
Financial statement Note 9 date typo (2024 vs 2025)

contradictions.description: Arizona Biltmore shows as '+1 Ceased Operations - Other Reasons' in Table 3 yet system grew by 1 — likely brand conversion, not cessation
Note 9 states 'through March 18, 2024' but auditor report dated March 18, 2025 — typographical error
